Cycling Track

  • Location

    Hudayriyat Island,
    Abu Dhabi.

  • Opening Hours

    Weekdays : 5 AM - 12 AM

Hop on your bike and explore the scenic beauty of Hudayriyat Island along its well-designed cycling tracks.

Whether you're a beginner or an experienced rider, you'll find the perfect route, with options ranging from 1 to 10 kilometers.

The tracks wind through lush green spaces and recreational areas, offering a peaceful ride that brings you closer to nature. Enjoy the fresh air, picturesque views, and the sense of adventure as you cycle around this serene natural haven.

Available Sports

Cycling
